jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Manipal Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
